records.name: Rakus

reasons.notes: Convergence-test candidate — human review needed before consolidation.

records.rawExplanation:
*2021 (SaaS-mania peak):* stock ¥807.5 (Feb 19) – ¥2,387.5 (Sep 15) per Nikkei 10-year history. Sep 15 ¥2,387.5 is the all-time high in the 5-year window and represents the 2021 SaaS-mania peak; from Feb low to Sep high = +3.0x intra-year rally on hypergrowth narrative. FY3/2021 financials: rich-coverage trend signal — "two-year-period average revenue growth +33.59%, OP growth +148.08%" per QUICK Money World snippet aggregating multi-year context. FY3/2021 specific actuals partial. Stock-move catalyst: 2021 SaaS-mania sector-wide re-rating + Rakuraku Seisan + MailDealer hypergrowth (sourced as sector context, not name-specific event). 業績 ◎ (hypergrowth, partial) / 株価 ◎◎ (SaaS-mania peak).

Sign summary: revenue rose on growth; hypergrowth phase; 2-year revenue growth +33.59% avg, OP growth +148.08% avg; SaaS-mania peak; shares rallied to ¥2,387.5 all-time high (Sep 15); business strong, stock strong.

records.rawExplanation:
*2022 (post-mania derating begins):* stock ¥606 (May 10) – ¥1,622.5 (Jan 5) per Nikkei. From Sep 2021 peak ¥2,387.5 to May 2022 trough ¥606 = -75% in 8 months. FY3/2022 financials partial (multi-year context shows continued revenue/OP growth, no derailment). **Stock-move catalyst: post-2021-SaaS-mania multiple compression** — sourced as broader sector phenomenon per catalyst search confirming "SaaS death / high growth expectations turned to bubbles" framing for the period. Same pattern as PLAID (4165) 2022 in the parser's existing taxonomy → NEW:mania_pop / NEW:post_ipo_unwind. 業績 ◎ (continued hypergrowth, partial) / 株価 ✕✕ (severe -75% derating).

Sign summary: revenue rose on growth; revenue rose on continued hypergrowth; shares collapsed -75% from peak on 2022 SaaS-multiple compression (post-IPO-mania unwind pattern); shares fell to ¥606 low (May 10); business strong, stock depressed.

records.rawExplanation:
*2023 (continued multi-year derating despite strong business):* stock ¥761 (Jan 4) – ¥1,361.3 (Nov 30). Year-end ¥1,361.3 is a recovery from lows but still -43% off the Sep 2021 peak. FY3/2023 actuals (sourced): revenue ¥27,399M, operating profit ¥1,656M. **Business fundamentals remained strong yet stock stayed depressed** — classic growth-stock-derating-while-business-grows pattern (Plaid 2023 analog → NEW:under_priced_de_rated_grower). Stock-move catalyst for the recovery off lows: not specifically sourced as a single event — catalyst needs_human; consistent with the broader 2023 derating-bottom narrative across Japanese SaaS. 業績 ◎ / 株価 ✕ (de-rated grower).

Sign summary: revenue rose +0.0% YoY; FY3/2023 revenue ¥27,399M / OP ¥1,656M; revenue rose on continued growth; stock depressed at multi-year lows (under-priced de-rated grower pattern); shares fell to ¥761 low (Jan 4); business strong, stock depressed.

records.rawExplanation:
*2024 (de-rating tail re-test):* stock ¥761 (Apr 26) – ¥1,282 (Jan 4); Apr re-tested 2023 lows. FY3/2024 actuals (sourced): **revenue ¥38,408M (+40.18% YoY), operating profit ¥5,559M (+235.69% YoY)** — massive profit acceleration. Despite this, stock re-tested ¥761 in April. **The widening gap between accelerating fundamentals and depressed stock matches the Plaid 2024 pattern → NEW:under_priced_de_rated_grower.** Stock-move catalyst for the Apr ¥761 low: not specifically sourced — catalyst needs_human (sector rotation / value-vs-growth flow during the period is the broader context, not a name-specific event). 業績 ◎◎ (revenue +40%, OP +236%) / 株価 ✕ (still de-rated despite business acceleration).

Sign summary: revenue rose +40.2% YoY; operating profit rose +235.7%; FY3/2024 record acceleration; shares re-tested 2023 lows despite massive profit acceleration (extreme under-priced de-rated grower); shares fell to ¥761 low (Apr 26); business strong, stock depressed.

records.rawExplanation:
*2025 (gradual stock recovery on continued fundamental acceleration):* stock ¥848.5 (Jan 17) – ¥1,395 (Sep 29) per Nikkei. FY3/2025 actuals (announced May 14, 2025): **revenue ¥48,904M (+27.3% YoY), operating profit ¥10,192M (+83.3% YoY), operating margin 20.8%** (high for SaaS), recurring profit ¥10,218M (+82.1%), net profit ¥8,003M (+91.2%). Cloud Services growth led by Rakuraku Seisan account-count expansion. Stock-move catalyst: FY3/2025 record results + 4th consecutive record-profit-year framing + operating margin reaching 20.8% — sourced fundamental. 業績 ◎◎ / 株価 ◎ (gradual recovery, still well below the 2021 peak).

Cautious side: FY3/2026 figures came back inconsistent across search snippets (one source mentioned rev ¥44.297B / OP ¥125億 / RP ¥140億 +70.7% but these don't reconcile with FY3/2025 ¥48.904B base × +24.6% YoY claim — likely a unit-conversion or attribution error in the snippet, NOT a hallucination in the fixture; **FY3/2026 specific numbers flagged for human verification before downstream use**); 4-year stock still well below 2021 peak even after strong fundamentals; IT HR divestiture transition; SaaS-multiple sensitivity remains.

Sign summary: revenue rose +27.3% YoY; operating profit rose +83.3%; net profit rose +91.2%; record operating profit, operating margin 20.8% (high for SaaS); fourth consecutive record-profit year; shares began recovering off multi-year lows; shares rallied to ¥1,395 high (Sep 29); business strong, stock strong.


Sources:
- https://moneyworld.jp/news/PIE0212_ainews (QUICK FY3/2025 通期決算)
- https://finance-frontend-pc-dist.west.edge.storage-yahoo.jp/disclosure/20250514/20250514548346.pdf (FY3/2025 決算説明資料 May 14, 2025)
- https://kabu.bridge-salon.jp/rakus-stock/ (bridge-salon Rakus deep-dive — multi-year context)
- https://www.rakus.co.jp/ir/materials/ (company IR materials page)
- https://www.buffett-code.com/company/3923/ (company profile)
- https://www.nikkei.com/nkd/company/history/yprice/?scode=3923 (Nikkei 10-year price history — all per-year highs/lows)
